name: wrenai
description: Discovery stub for the Wren AI agent skill bundle. The actual workflow guides, reference docs and prompt helpers live inside the wren CLI (`pip install wrenai`) and are served by `wren skills get` / `wren docs get` / `wren ask`.

skills.name: wren
skills.description: Wren CLI discovery stub. The actual workflow guides live inside the wren CLI; this stub teaches an AI agent to call `wren skills list`, `wren skills get <name>`, `wren docs get <reference>`, and `wren ask <prompt> --guided|--direct`. Use whenever the user asks a data question, wants to install / set up Wren Engine, connect a new database, load SaaS data via dlt, generate or regenerate an MDL project, or enrich a project with business context.

skills.name: wren-onboarding
skills.description: DEPRECATED redirect — fetch the current guide with `wren skills get onboarding`. Onboard a user to Wren Engine end-to-end. Triggers: 'install wren', 'set up wren engine', 'wren onboarding', 'connect new database to wren'.

skills.name: wren-usage
skills.description: DEPRECATED redirect — fetch the current guide with `wren skills get usage`. Day-to-day querying through the MDL semantic layer. Triggers on data questions, reports, metrics, revenue, trends, 'how many', 'show me', 'top N', 'compare', 'breakdown'.

skills.name: wren-generate-mdl
skills.description: DEPRECATED redirect — fetch the current guide with `wren skills get generate-mdl`. Generate a Wren MDL project from a live database schema.

skills.name: wren-dlt-connector
skills.description: DEPRECATED redirect — fetch the current guide with `wren skills get dlt-connector`. Connect SaaS data (HubSpot, Stripe, Salesforce, GitHub, Slack, etc.) via dlt into DuckDB.

skills.name: wren-enrich-context
skills.description: DEPRECATED redirect — fetch the current guide with `wren skills get enrich-context`. Augment a Wren project with business context (enum meanings, units, NULL semantics, cubes for ARR / DAU / churn).
